title: Show HN: Echo – Fable-level results at 1/3 the cost using open-weight models
summary: Echo is an AI system that dynamically allocates inference across multiple open-weight models (e.g., GLM-5.2, Kimi K2.7) per request, achieving Fable-level performance at one-third the cost. It decides which models to use and how to combine outputs, leveraging model complementarity. A chat interface and API are available for testing.
